title: La Palma - Tourism Website
body: [![](http://farm4.static.flickr.com/3412/3328904114_6f45c1e194_m.jpg "lapalma.es")](http://www.lapalma.es/)My collaboration with **Socialtec** continues. After [Hosteltur](http://www.xarop.com/nueva-portada-comunidad-hosteltur/), we’re working on another destination tourism website—this time for the Canary Island of [La Palma](http://www.lapalma.es/), the “Beautiful Island.”
